name: smoove
title: smoove
description: Skills for authoring Remotion-style, timeline-driven video compositions with smoove, a Konva-based animation engine.

skills.name: smoove-video
skills.description: Author beautiful smoove video compositions: Composition/Sequence sequencing, Flex/Block layout, interpolate-based animation, Text, shapes, and media.

skills.name: smoove-best-practices
skills.description: Run, embed, and render a smoove composition: wiring <smoove-player>, building a <Studio> app, and rendering to MP4/WebM with @smoove/renderer, plus fast-fix gotchas for blank players, SSR, and server-side fonts/assets.
